case_title: AMERICAN EXPRESS BANK, FSB VS. BASSAM YOUSEF et al

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS BANK, FSB SERVED DEC-28-2010, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT YOUSEF, BASSAM
